sub_modules.fp_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 field extraction, effective subtraction sign handling, significand creation, and zero/INF/NaN classification.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Combinational special-case resolver for NaNs, infinities, signed zeros, and single-zero operand bypasses.
sub_modules.fp_align: Combinational magnitude ordering, exponent comparison, significand extension, and right-shift alignment with sticky-bit generation.
sub_modules.fp_addsub_sig: Combinational aligned significand addition or subtraction using effective operand signs.
sub_modules.fp_normalize: Combinational post-add normalization, including carry-right normalization and cancellation left-normalization.
sub_modules.fp_round_pack: Combinational round-to-nearest-even logic, overflow handling, subnormal/normal exponent selection, and IEEE-754 result packing.
